mapper.sql:
SELECT c.id AS customer_id, c.company_name, c.tax_no, c.address, c.remark, MAX(r.charge_end_date) AS latest_charge_end_date, DATEDIFF(MAX(r.charge_end_date), CURDATE()) AS remain_days, CASE WHEN MAX(r.charge_end_date) IS NULL THEN 'NO_RECORD' WHEN DATEDIFF(MAX(r.charge_end_date), CURDATE()) < 0 THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN DATEDIFF(MAX(r.charge_end_date), CURDATE()) <= 5 THEN 'WARNING_5' WHEN DATEDIFF(MAX(r.charge_end_date), CURDATE()) <= 30 THEN 'WARNING_30' WHEN DATEDIFF(MAX(r.charge_end_date), CURDATE()) <= 60 THEN 'WARNING_60' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS expire_status, pc.contact_name AS primary_contact_name, pc.contact_phone AS primary_contact_phone, pc.contact_wechat AS primary_contact_wechat, lr.receive_date AS latest_receive_date, lr.amount AS latest_receive_amount FROM acct_customer c LEFT JOIN acct_service_fee_record r ON c.id = r.customer_id AND r.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN acct_customer_contact pc ON c.id = pc.customer_id AND pc.deleted = 0 AND pc.is_primary = 1 LEFT JOIN acct_service_fee_record lr ON lr.id = ( SELECT rr.id FROM acct_service_fee_record rr WHERE rr.customer_id = c.id AND rr.deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.receive_date DESC, rr.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1
AND c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.companyName}, '%')
GROUP BY c.id, c.company_name, c.tax_no, c.address, c.remark, pc.contact_name, pc.contact_phone, pc.contact_wechat, lr.receive_date, lr.amount
